source_filing: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K (filed 2025-11, fiscal year ended September 27, 2025)
original_text: the Company estimates, with 95% confidence, a maximum one-day loss in fair value of $590 million and $538 million as of September 27, 2025 and September 28, 2024, respectively.
modified_text: Using a value-at-risk model, Apple estimated, with 95% confidence, a maximum one-day loss in fair value of its foreign currency positions of $590 million and $438 million as of September 27, 2025 and September 28, 2024, respectively.
claim: Apple's modeled maximum one-day loss on foreign currency derivative positions was $590 million at FY2025 year-end and $438 million at FY2024 year-end, at 95% confidence.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K, Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk
notes: Paired-figure pattern: the prior-year figure was changed from $538 million to $438 million while the current-year $590 million and the 95% confidence level are left intact, creating an internal inconsistency against the source.
